meaning: n.<主苏>少年,年青人,老弟(表示亲密的称呼)
examples: Did you ever see a laddie go this way and that?
"We focus a lot on marine protected areas, " said Laddie Akins, the executive director of REEF.
Jellinek promises no such laddie hijinks at the new Playboy.
Mr Justice Laddie was told that a "passing-off" claim by the old band seeking damages and an injunction to stop the new band using the name would be dismissed by consent.
